title: Salty Crispy Dutch New Potatoes Stir-fry
description: A quick and easy stir-fry dish featuring crispy new potatoes seasoned with salt to help alleviate hangovers.
instructions: Wash and scrub the young potatoes thoroughly.
Cut the potatoes into even, bite-sized pieces.
Toss the potato pieces in a bowl with vegetable oil until evenly coated.
Place the coated potato pieces on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Bake for 10 minutes, then reduce heat to 375°F (190°C) and continue baking for another 20-25 minutes or until crispy.
Remove from oven and sprinkle with salt and freshly ground black pepper immediately after removing the potatoes. Allow them to cool slightly before serving.
